◎简　　介  

　　The Apprentice: ONE Championship Edition is a reality television program that premiered in Asia on 18 March 2021 and will air worldwide from June 2021. Unlike The Apprentice Asia, it is a new global edition co-owned by MGM and ONE Championship.The show features 16 candidates from around the world competing in both business and physical challenges.
